integration_validation_v2.evidence: ModelSession is a pre-existing Handshake primitive in src/storage/mod.rs:1450 / postgres.rs:1287 (model_sessions table), with NO MT-142 marker and lacking the contract-named fields agent/purpose/close_reason/actor (ModelSessionState enum has no Closed/close-reason, struct has no purpose/agent). tests/model_session_scheduler_tests.rs:571 proves durable PG session persist+reload across a job (get_model_session :611), which is real managed-resource behavior, but it exercises the pre-existing scheduler, not an MT-142-specific durable-session schema. Real PG, but proof does not map to the contract's required field set.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V2 gap: ModelSession lacked contract-named fields. V3 added them for real: storage/mod.rs:1488-1502 (agent/purpose/close_reason/closed_by_actor/closed_at), postgres.rs:1351-1355 ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, close_model_session guard postgres.rs:7161-7227 (terminal-state, non-empty reason/actor validation), sqlite read-parity. Proof tests/model_session_durable_record_tests.rs: three-phase fresh-PG-pool restart simulation proving fields survive restart and close metadata survives a second restart; invalid close requests rejected with guarded row untouched. NOTE: V3 validation found+fixed a stale ModelSession struct literal in kernel_dcc_session_spawn_tree_tests.rs (validator mechanical compile repair, commit 524184b2).
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-142 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] ModelSession Record -- Implement durable model sessions (id
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for ModelSession Record
scope.summary: MT-142 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] ModelSession Record -- Implement durable model sessions (id, agent, purpose, metadata, timestamps, state, actor, close reason) surviving restart.
